headline: Chelsea and Man City finalising Maresca compensation
body: Compensation for Enzo Maresca's transfer from Chelsea to Manchester City is nearing finalisation.
text:
Compensation to Chelsea for Enzo Maresca’s move to Manchester City is now close to being finalised.

Maresca is already part of all summer planning.👕
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Chelsea and Man City finalising Maresca compensation
